ink.$description: Ink — Body text, borders, pill button fills, logo — the structural constant across every section

sage.$description: Sage — Dominant neutral for section backgrounds, form borders, and the shop canvas — carries the largest surface area on the site

cream.$description: Cream — Card surfaces, input fills, text on dark pill buttons — the only true white, used sparingly as a counterpoint to the painted section bands

terracotta.$description: Terracotta — Hero section background, circular product label accents — warm clay red that grounds the brand in earth and roast

lavender.$description: Lavender — Violet outline accent for tags, dividers, and focused UI edges

moss.$description: Moss — Green accent for outlined action borders, linked labels, and lightweight interactive emphasis. Do not promote it to the primary CTA color

sunshine.$description: Sunshine — Surface band accent, subtle background wash — buttery yellow used as a section break between terracotta and sage

sky.$description: Sky — Testimonial section background — washed pale blue providing a cool, airy counterpoint to the warm dominant tones

apercu-mono.$description: Sole UI typeface — all navigation, body copy, prices, buttons, labels, and links rendered in monospace. The 50px size is reserved for hero display lines; 20-24px is the working range for everything from button text to product names. Monospaced letterforms are a deliberate anti-corporate signal: labels read like typewriter tags stamped on coffee bags, not SaaS chrome.

touchy-script-custom.$description: Custom hand-drawn bouncy script used exclusively for the wordmark 'touchy coffee'. The letterforms are loose, slightly irregular, and bubble-like — the single brand-defining element that signals craft and personality before any product is shown.

apercu-mono-bold.$description: Apercu Mono Bold — detected in extracted data but not described by AI

terracotta-band.$description: Surface level 1: Hero section canvas — warm clay full-bleed background

sage-band.$description: Surface level 2: Shop/product grid section — dominant neutral canvas

sky-band.$description: Surface level 3: Testimonials section — airy cool break between warm bands

card-surface.$description: Surface level 4: Product cards, testimonial cards, newsletter popup — the elevated readable surface
